requests.name: Set Parent Email (invite parent)
requests.notes: Set or update parent email. Generates a parent_access_token and sends invitation email. Use parentEmail: null to remove.

requests.name: Remove Parent Access
requests.notes: Remove parent access by clearing the email and token.

requests.name: Parent View (public, no auth)
requests.notes: Public endpoint — no auth required. Returns student's first name, saved listings, and bid status. Returns 404 if token is invalid.
